description: Implement the 'Per-App Language Preferences' feature for the PolyglotReader app to allow users to switch the app language between English, French, and Spanish independently of the system language. Create the locale configuration file at 'app/src/main/res/xml/locales_config.xml' and implement the necessary logic in the AndroidManifest.xml and MainActivity.kt so that the existing UI buttons for English, French, and Spanish correctly update the application's locale.
